primary-face.$value: clean geometric sans serif, high legibility

base-aesthetic.$value: premium editorial product visual, crisp geometry, controlled contrast, refined lighting, balanced negative space

mood-clean.$value: clean minimal composition, precise edges, quiet confidence, no clutter

global-exclude.$value: low quality, blurry, distorted text, malformed logo, watermark, crowded layout, off-brand colors

campaign.name: feature-x-launch
campaign.brief: 新功能 X 上线宣发

content.headline: Meet Feature X
content.subject: a polished SaaS product launch visual centered on a luminous product interface

content.positioning: A focused family of developer tools for agentic software work.

elements.description: A visual rail connecting locked style tokens to versioned campaign artifacts.
Make the actual product or workflow the first visual signal; avoid generic abstract SaaS imagery.

accepted.notes: Accepted as a CodeFox logo-led launch direction.

product.positioning: A harness that turns locked brand tokens into versioned marketing assets.
audience: project teams consuming published marketing artifacts

accepted_styles: logo-led fox mascot with production artifact framing

elements.description: Seated orange fox mascot with cream tail tip and dark teal outline.
Neatly stacked published assets paired with a manifest or version label.

accepted.notes: Accepted as a reusable CodeFox logo-led campaign example.

resolved_style.name: launch-hero
resolved_style.prompt: premium editorial product visual, crisp geometry, controlled contrast, refined lighting, balanced negative space, clean minimal composition, precise edges, quiet confidence, no clutter
resolved_style.typography: clean geometric sans serif, high legibility
resolved_style.negative: low quality, blurry, distorted text, malformed logo, watermark, crowded layout, off-brand colors

assets.prompt:
Brand style: premium editorial product visual, crisp geometry, controlled contrast, refined lighting, balanced negative space, clean minimal composition, precise edges, quiet confidence, no clutter
Campaign brief: 新功能 X 上线宣发
Subject: a polished SaaS product launch visual centered on a luminous product interface
Deliverable: wechat-header, 900x383px
Headline text to render exactly: "Meet Feature X"
Use only this brand palette unless natural lighting requires subtle neutrals: #1A1A2E, #E94560
Typography direction for visible text: clean geometric sans serif, high legibility
Respect brand reference assets: workspace/products/codefox/codefox/references/main_visual.png
Keep the locked brand style constant; vary only the campaign content and composition for this deliverable.
assets.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted text, malformed logo, watermark, crowded layout, off-brand colors
